notes.claude_2.1.157: Not tested. Likely broken same as v2.1.156 (system messages in messages array)
notes.claude_2.1.156: BROKEN with DeepSeek - sends system as role:'system' in messages array (new Anthropic format). DeepSeek only supports top-level 'system' field. 400 on turn 1 (INSTANT FAIL). Original thinking-block bug is RESOLVED on DeepSeek side.
notes.claude_2.1.154: Likely BROKEN - v2.1.154 changelog says system prompt moved to messages array for non-Haiku/Sonnet/Opus models. DeepSeek endpoint rejects role:'system' in messages array.
notes.claude_2.1.153: BROKEN with DeepSeek - malformed thinking blocks cause 400 API errors on tool use. Downgrade to 2.1.143.
notes.proxy: claude-deepseek-proxy.js included for reference. Simple prompts work with v2.1.153+ through the proxy, but tool-based conversations still fail due to DeepSeek API bugs in thinking block validation.
